relationships.description: Mold-susceptible sorghum has higher concentrations of volatile compounds
Mold-resistant sorghum has lower concentrations of volatile compounds
2-methylbutanal is one of the identified volatile compounds
2-methylbutanal is severalfold higher in mold-susceptible sorghum
Fungal organisms contribute to the volatile compounds in mold-susceptible grains
Sorghum was grown in a greenhouse environment
Sorghum was grown in a field environment
